signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin has officially launched across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum as of April 13, 2026, driving massive capital influx and record XRPL transaction volume amid heightened institutional adoption.[2]

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The long-standing SEC vs. Ripple case has reached finality, removing a major overhang and paving the way for broader XRP integration.[2]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119.6M for Week Ending April 11 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Seven spot XRP ETFs recorded the strongest weekly net inflows ($119.6M) since December, with assets under management nearing $1B; SEC/CFTC classified XRP as a digital commodity in March.[5]

signals.headline: Fed held rates steady at 4
signals.raw: Fed held rates steady at 4.25-4.5% in late 2024/early 2025 (no urgency to cut due to elevated inflation), impacting South Korea's Bank of Korea policy options.[1]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.raw: April 2026 PCE data showed headline inflation at 2.1% YoY (core 2.5%), with tariffs expected to push it higher; no new resolutions.[3]

signals.raw:

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Heads to Senate Banking Markup in Late April | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Heads to Senate Banking Markup in Late April | NO | MED confidence**  
The bill, which could enable banks to use XRP for liquidity, is advancing with endorsements but awaits markup vote; Senate returned April 13 with no confirmation of passage.[3][5][6]
